Default Prove-Up In Scd 218 At 09:00 Am On March 24, 2003
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Settlement Conference. Commissioner: Sue M. Kaplan, Clerk: P. Dias, Reporter: Loretta Najera. Kurt Miller, Esq. represented Plaintiff, Victoria Fisher. The Court notes for the record that default was entered against Defendants, Barbara Brown and Michael Yoker on February 3, 2003. Plaintiff, Victoria was sworn and examined. The Court receives evidence and takes the matter under submission for decision.
